name: Sardine Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar (9 3/4 oz) olive salad, drained, coarsely chopped
4 cans (4 3/8 oz size) oil-packed sardines, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the barley and place it in a medium saucepan.
2. Add 1 quart salted water to the saucepan.
3. Heat the mixture to boiling over medium heat.
4. Once boiling, reduce the heat to maintain a simmer for approximately 40 minutes or until the barley is tender.
5. Drain the cooked barley and transfer it to a large bowl.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (olive salad, sardines, chopped red onion, and balsamic vinaigrette) to the bowl with the barley.
7. Gently toss all ingredients together to combine.
8. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Makes 8 servings.
Per serving: 167 calories, 8 g protein, 9 g carbohydrate, 11 g fat, 22 mg cholesterol, 662 mg sodium.
